info.name: Telemax API Test Cases — V1 & V2
info.description:
Comprehensive API test collection for Telemax API Version 1 and Version 2.

Author: Hanna Lee
Date: 2026-05-10
Version: 1.0
Module: Telemax External API
Environment: API (REST v1 & v2, Bearer token auth)
Status: Not Run

Coverage:
- Authentication — V1 & V2 (AUTH-001 to AUTH-012)
- Fleet & Position — V1 & V2 (POS-001 to POS-012)
- Trip Replay — V1 & V2 (TRIP-001 to TRIP-005)
- Alerts — V1 & V2 (ALRT-001 to ALRT-008)
- Vehicle Commands — V1 & V2 (CMD-001 to CMD-010)
- IMEI & Vehicle Info — V1 & V2 (IMEI-001 to IMEI-007)
- Battery Health — V1 & V2 (BATT-001 to BATT-006)
- Safety Score — V1 (SAFE-001 to SAFE-007)
- DTC Codes — V1 & V2 (DTC-001 to DTC-005)
- Webhooks — V2 Only (HOOK-001 to HOOK-010)
- Pagination & Error Handling — V2 (PAGE-001 to PAGE-008)
- Health Check & Deprecation (HLTH-001 to HLTH-004)

Rules applied: TESTCASE_RULES_SHARED.md + TESTCASE_RULES_API.md
API Reference: Telemax API — Testing Summary (docs.telemax.com.au)

SETUP:
1. Set collection variables: base_url, username, password, api_key, company_id, vehicle_id, device_id, imei, vin
2. Run AUTH-001 first to populate access_token
3. Run ALRT-001 before ALRT-002 (chains alert_id)
4. Run HOOK-001 before HOOK-002 through HOOK-008 (chains webhook_id)


API Documentation Sources:
  Primary:        docs.telemax.com.au/test/introduction
  Alt (general):  eclectic-cassata-b60697.netlify.app
  Alt (v2):       cosmic-brioche-eccf27.netlify.app
  Battery Health: flepsi-batteryhealth-replacement.netlify.app

item.name: Authentication — V1 & V2
AUTH-001: Verify obtaining token successfully with valid username and password (V1)

exec: // ⚠ NOTE — CQ-006 (Medium — TC can run; document actual behaviour)

// Question: For V1 POST /api/Authentication/token/user and /token/api-key — is the 'grant_type' field required in the form-encoded request body, or can it be omitted? The testing summary shows it in examples but does not explicitly state whether it is required or optional.
// REQUIREMENT REFERENCE: docs.telemax.com.au/test/introduction | eclectic-cassata-b60697.netlify.app | Telemax API Testing Summary §1

// The document at docs.telemax.com.au/test/introduction has mentioned that "valid credentials return a JWT with correct fields: access_token, token_type (bearer), expires_in (~86399 seconds)" — it means we need to consider this test case to verify the output.
// Obtaining a valid JWT is a prerequisite for every other authenticated endpoint.
// No prior setup needed — this is an anonymous endpoint.

Preconditions:
- No auth required (anonymous endpoint)
- Staging environment is accessible
- {{username}} and {{password}} are set to valid test credentials

Postconditions:
- access_token collection variable is set for subsequent requests
